german_requirement.title: German Language Requirement is Not Dominant
german_requirement.subtitle: A significant portion of roles do not require German, highlighting accessibility issues.

pm_type.title: Core PMs Lead, But Technical Roles Trail Behind
pm_type.subtitle: A notable gap exists between Core and Technical PM positions, indicating potential constraints in talent accessibility.

seniority.title: Senior Roles Dominate the Workforce
seniority.subtitle: With 56% of positions held by senior professionals, the market is clearly senior-heavy.

work_mode.title: On-site Work Dominates Despite Remote Options
work_mode.subtitle: A significant portion of employees still prefer on-site arrangements over flexible work modes.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, limiting remote access.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Becoming Mainstream
ai.subtitle: 37% of roles prioritize AI responsibilities, with 33% requiring AI skills.

industry.title: Industry Roles Exhibit Notable Diversity and Balance
industry.subtitle: A significant portion of roles remains unclassified, indicating potential accessibility constraints.
